title: Nice To Meet You
why_this_song: Nice To Meet You by Myles Smith (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Lonely in this crowd, I sit alone, oh
We could dance 'til the morning light
Then let's play it on repeat"

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: One more drink away from heading home, oh
Glad she came right up to me
She said, "Oh, hi, nice to meet you

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Nice To Meet You", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Nice To Meet You", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Nice To Meet You" was released in 2024. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Nice To Meet You" foi lançada em 2024. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Myles Smith one question about "Nice To Meet You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Myles Smith sobre "Nice To Meet You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Nice To Meet You" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Nice To Meet You" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Nice To Meet You" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Nice To Meet You" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
